coveo:metadata.title: All The Different Types of Green Gemstones
coveo:metadata.description: There’s something effortlessly refreshing about green gemstones. Maybe it’s the way their vibrant green color brings life to any look, or how they feel like tiny pieces of nature captured in crystal form.

coveo:metadata.title: Discover the Rarest Gemstone in the World
coveo:metadata.description: Ever wondered what is the rarest gemstone in the world? It’s a fascinating journey into geology, history, and sparkle. This guide uncovers the gems so rare even collectors dream of finding them.

coveo:metadata.title: Gemstone Meanings: Symbolism and Significance Explained
coveo:metadata.description: Gemstones have always been more than just beautiful; they’re full of symbolism, history, and personal meaning.

coveo:metadata.title: All The Different Types of Blue Gemstones
coveo:metadata.description: Blue gemstones have long been cherished for their serene beauty and deep symbolism.

coveo:metadata.title: Gemstones and Birthstones by Month: Your Complete Guide

coveo:metadata.description: Gemstones have fascinated humans for centuries

coveo:metadata.title: Do Men Wear Engagement Rings?
coveo:metadata.description: Once considered a tradition reserved for women, engagement rings are evolving.

coveo:metadata.title: Different Types of Diamond Cuts
coveo:metadata.description: Diamonds may be forever – but the cut you choose makes all the difference. From classic round brilliant cuts to vintage-inspired cushion cuts, the types of diamond cuts available today offer something for every style and story.

coveo:metadata.title: Lab-Grown vs Natural Diamonds – What's The Difference?
coveo:metadata.description: When it comes to finding the perfect diamond, there’s one big question: lab-grown or natural? Both are gorgeous and valuable, but they come from very different places.

coveo:metadata.title: January Birthstone Meaning: Everything You Need to Know About Garnet
coveo:metadata.description: Whether you're celebrating a January birthday or marking a special milestone like a 2nd wedding anniversary, the rich, deep red hues of the garnet gemstone capture the warmth and strength of winter.

coveo:metadata.title: What is the birthstone for October? Why Does October Have 2 Birthstones?
coveo:metadata.description: October is one of those lucky months to have two official stunning birthstones: the mystical and colorful opal birthstone and the vibrant and charming pink tourmaline birthstone.

coveo:metadata.title: What is the Birthstone for December? December Birthstone Meaning and Jewelry Ideas
coveo:metadata.description: Blue topaz, the birthstone for December, is one of the most captivating and serene gemstones that reflect your cool and calm spirit.

coveo:metadata.title: What is the Birthstone for November? November Birthstone Meaning
coveo:metadata.description: Are you a November baby? Congratulations! It's time to explore a gemstone wonderland that reflects your unique warmth, creativity, and spirit. The citrine is November's birthstone and one of the most captivating and radiant gemstones.

coveo:metadata.title: What is the Birthstone for September?
coveo:metadata.description: Are serenity, loyalty, and wisdom your unique traits? If you said yes, then you must have a September birthday! And it's not a surprise that the sapphire birthstone perfectly captures the essence of your personality.

coveo:metadata.title: What is the Birthstone for July? July Birthstone Meaning and Jewelry Ideas
coveo:metadata.description: Ruby, the birthstone for July, is one of the most captivating and fiery gemstones that reflect your passionate and vibrant spirit.

coveo:metadata.title: May Birthstone Meaning and Our Favorite Jewelry Styles
coveo:metadata.description: Are you a May baby? Congratulations! It's time to explore a gemstone wonderland that reflects your unique energy, loyalty, and spirit.

coveo:metadata.title: What is the Birthstone for August? August Birthstone Meaning and Custom Jewelry
coveo:metadata.description: Discover what the August birthstone means and how you can embrace your birth month through stylish, customized jewelry today!

coveo:metadata.title: What is the Birthstone for June? June Birthstone Meanings and Our Favorite Jewelry Styles
coveo:metadata.description: June is fortunate to have two official gemstones to represent it: the timeless and ever elegant pearl and the mystical and shimmering alexandrite.

coveo:metadata.title: 3 Myths About Handmade Jewelry
coveo:metadata.description: For more than 100,000 years, people have been adorning themselves with handmade jewelry. Read on to uncover 3 myths about artisanal jewelry, and why Jewlr’s pieces last a lifetime.

coveo:metadata.description: Special — that’s how a piece of jewelry should make the wearer feel. Personalized jewelry sales are booming at Jewlr.
